narrative:
Cols 29-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,193 registered voters, with 72.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points.
